# cloudru-community_free_tier_vm (Resource)

Cloud.ru free-tier virtual machine (managed via Compute API `POST /api/v1/free-tier`).

The platform automatically selects the flavor and boot disk — you only provide
an image, a name and optional credentials/networking.

> Each Cloud.ru organisation may have at most one active free-tier VM.
> Use `GET /api/v1/free-tier?project_id=…` to check eligibility before creating.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) VM name (1–64 chars, must start with a letter).

### Optional

- `availability_zone` (Block, Optional) Availability zone. If omitted, the platform picks the default free-tier zone. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--availability_zone))
- `description` (String) VM description.
- `image` (Block, Optional) Boot image and initial credentials. The image must have `free_tier_enabled = true`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--image))
- `new_floating_ip` (Boolean) Assign a new public IP to the VM's network interface.
- `project_id` (String) Project ID. Defaults to the provider `project_id`.
- `tags` (Block List) Tags attached to this VM. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--tags))

### Read-Only

- `created_time` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `disks` (Block List) Disks attached to the VM (assigned by the platform, read-only). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--disks))
- `flavor` (Block, Read-only) Flavor assigned by the platform (read-only). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--flavor))
- `id` (String) VM ID.
- `interfaces` (Block List) Network interfaces (assigned by the platform, read-only). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--interfaces))
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the VM is locked for changes.
- `modified_time` (String) Last modification timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `state` (String) VM state (`running`, `stopped`, `creating`, …).
- `vnc_url` (String) VNC console URL.
- `vnc_ws` (String) VNC WebSocket URL.

<a id="nestedblock--availability_zone"></a>
### Nested Schema for `availability_zone`

Optional:

- `id` (String) Availability zone ID.
- `name` (String) Availability zone name (e.g. `ru.AZ-1`).


<a id="nestedblock--image"></a>
### Nested Schema for `image`

Required:

- `host_name` (String) Hostname to set inside the VM.
- `id` (String) Image ID. Must be a free-tier-enabled image.
- `user_name` (String) Initial OS user name.

Optional:

- `password` (String, Sensitive) Initial user password.
- `public_key` (String) SSH public key for the initial user.

Read-Only:

- `free_tier_enabled` (Boolean) Whether this image supports free tier (always true for valid free-tier VMs).
- `name` (String) Image name (computed).


<a id="nestedblock--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `id` (String) Tag ID.

Read-Only:

- `color` (String) Tag color.
- `name` (String) Tag name.


<a id="nestedblock--disks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `disks`

Read-Only:

- `disk_type` (Block, Read-only) Disk type (assigned by the platform). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--disks--disk_type))
- `id` (String) Disk ID.
- `name` (String) Disk name.
- `primary` (Boolean) Whether this is the boot disk.
- `size` (Number) Disk size in GiB.
- `state` (String) Disk state.

<a id="nestedblock--disks--disk_type"></a>
### Nested Schema for `disks.disk_type`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Disk type ID.
- `name` (String) Disk type name.



<a id="nestedblock--flavor"></a>
### Nested Schema for `flavor`

Read-Only:

- `cpu` (Number) Number of vCPUs.
- `gpu` (Number) Number of GPUs.
- `id` (String) Flavor ID.
- `name` (String) Flavor name.
- `oversubscription` (String) vCPU oversubscription ratio (e.g. `1:1`).
- `ram` (Number) RAM in GiB.


<a id="nestedblock--interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces`

Read-Only:

- `floating_ip` (Block, Read-only) Floating IP attached to this interface (present when `new_floating_ip = true`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--interfaces--floating_ip))
- `id` (String) Interface ID.
- `interface_security_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the interface can be added to a security group.
- `ip_address` (String) Private IP address.
- `name` (String) Interface name.
- `primary` (Boolean) Whether this is the primary interface.
- `security_groups` (Block List) Security groups attached to this interface. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--interfaces--security_groups))
- `state` (String) Interface state.
- `type` (String) Interface type.

<a id="nestedblock--interfaces--floating_ip"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces.floating_ip`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Floating IP ID.
- `ip_address` (String) Public IP address.
- `name` (String) Floating IP name.
- `state` (String) Floating IP state.


<a id="nestedblock--interfaces--security_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces.security_groups`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Security group ID.
- `name` (String) Security group name.
- `state` (String) Security group state.
